subcodes.first_line: O son of Raḍa’r-Rúḥ! Upon thee be the Glory of God, the Speaker on Sinai, through Whom the hearts of the peoples of the world have been attracted
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا ابن رضا الروح علیک بهاءالله مکلم الطور الذی به انجذبت افئده الامم و نطقت
subcodes.subjects: @the Word of God; influence and centrality of, @outward and inward meanings, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience, @proclamation to divines; to religious leaders, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @prophecy and fulfillment, @Crimson Ark; the Ark of God, @spiritual transformation
